expectations.text: Contains a call-to-action element (button or link) encouraging the user to take action
expectations.evidence: 'Make Your First Transaction' button present; also has 'Send Money', 'Request Payment', 'Schedule Payment' action shortcuts

expectations.text: The copy is friendly and explanatory — not just a terse message like 'No transactions found'
expectations.evidence: 'Once you send, receive, or schedule a payment it will appear here so you can track every move of your money.' — warm, explanatory copy

expectations.text: Includes a visual element beyond just text (icon placeholder, illustration area, or decorative graphic)
expectations.evidence: SVG element present: .card-header-icon with SVG content

expectations.text: Uses hsl() color notation for colors
expectations.evidence: 0 hsl() uses; 35 hex values — all colors in hex format
